name: LinkedIn Posts → personal-website (weekly)
description: Weekly cron: scrapes Alec's LinkedIn via Apify, filters to Alec's own posts (URL slug must contain /posts/alecfoster_), commits normalized JSON to alectivism/personal-website.

parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ message: 'data: weekly linkedin sync (' + $('Build linkedin-posts.json').first().json.post_count + ' posts)', content: $('Build linkedin-posts.json').first().json.content_b64, sha: $('GitHub: get current file SHA').first().json.sha, branch: 'main' }) }}
